aigcbench.en:
AIGCBench benchmarks Image-to-Video and T2V generation with 11 metrics across alignment, motion, temporal consistency, and visual quality (reference and no-reference).

- Builds open-domain image-text / video-text prompts with a unified generation pipeline
- Limit: automatic metrics may miss semantics, physics, and human preference
aigcbench.zh:
AIGCBench 评测 Image-to-Video / T2V 生成，覆盖 control-video alignment、motion、时序一致性与画面质量等 11 项指标（含 reference / no-reference）。

- 用统一生成流程对比不同 I2V 方法
- 局限：自动指标难覆盖复杂语义、物理因果与人类偏好

camerabench.en:
CameraBench tests whether models understand **camera motion** (pan, tilt, roll, zoom, tracking, follow), not general video aesthetics.

- ~3,000 expert-annotated web videos with a cinematographer-designed motion taxonomy
- Useful for camera-controlled generation and viewpoint reasoning in world models
camerabench.zh:
CameraBench 评估模型对**相机运动**（pan、tilt、roll、zoom、tracking、follow 等）的理解，而非一般视频美学。

- 约 3,000 个专家标注视频，含摄影师协作设计的 motion taxonomy
- 适用于相机可控生成与世界模型中的视角理解

chronomagic-bench.en:
ChronoMagic-Bench evaluates **text-to-time-lapse** generation: long-horizon state change with temporal coherence (growth, weather, melting, etc.).

- 1,649 prompts, 4 categories, 75 subcategories
- Limit: time-lapse only; not a proxy for action video or interactive worlds
chronomagic-bench.zh:
ChronoMagic-Bench 评测 **text-to-time-lapse** 生成：跨时间尺度的状态变化与长期时序连贯性（生长、气象、融化等）。

- 1,649 prompts，4 大类，75 子类
- 局限：仅限 time-lapse，不能代表普通动作视频或交互式世界模型

devil-dynamics.en:
DEVIL scores T2V **dynamics**: motion range, controllability, and dynamics-aware quality—not just temporal stability.

- Separates “stable but static” from “moving but uncontrolled” failures
- Dynamics metrics correlate well with human judgments
devil-dynamics.zh:
DEVIL 从**动态**角度评测 T2V：运动幅度、可控性与 dynamics-aware quality，而非只看时序稳定。

- 区分「稳定但几乎不动」与「有运动但不受 prompt 控制」
- dynamics 指标与人类评价相关性较高

evalcrafter.en:
EvalCrafter is an early systematic T2V benchmark (~17 objective metrics + human studies) covering visual, content, motion, and text alignment.

- Extends beyond single scores like FVD / CLIPScore
- Limit: weak on physics, world knowledge, and complex interaction
evalcrafter.zh:
EvalCrafter 是较早的系统化 T2V benchmark（约 17 个客观指标 + 人工研究），覆盖视觉、内容、运动与文本对齐。

- 将评测从单一 FVD / CLIPScore 扩展到多维诊断
- 局限：对物理、世界知识与复杂交互覆盖有限

ewmbench.en:
EWMBench (Embodied World Model Benchmark) checks whether generated video supports embodied tasks: scene consistency, motion correctness, and semantic alignment.

- Focus: actionable scenes, not just “good-looking” video
- Limit: mostly offline video quality; limited closed-loop robot evidence
ewmbench.zh:
EWMBench（Embodied World Model Benchmark）评估生成视频是否支持具身任务：场景一致、动作正确、语义对齐。

- 关注可执行场景，而非仅「好看」的视频
- 局限：以离线视频质量为主，闭环机器人收益覆盖有限

fetv.en:
FETV is a fine-grained open-domain T2V benchmark organized by content, controllable attributes, complexity, and temporal categories.

- Enables per-prompt-type error analysis
- Limit: short open-domain video; not focused on physics or long-horizon interaction
fetv.zh:
FETV 是细粒度 open-domain T2V benchmark，按内容、可控属性、复杂度与时间类别组织 prompt。

- 支持按 prompt 类型的 error analysis
- 局限：偏短视频；非物理或长时交互核心目标

genai-bench.en:
GenAI-Bench tests **compositional** text-to-visual generation (attributes, relations, counts, logic) for image and video models.

- Drives VQAScore and GenAI-Rank for alignment and ranking
- Limit: not a dedicated video physics / temporal benchmark
genai-bench.zh:
GenAI-Bench 评测**组合式** text-to-visual 生成（属性、关系、数量、逻辑），覆盖图像与视频模型。

- 推动 VQAScore、GenAI-Rank 等对齐与排序指标
- 局限：非专门的视频物理 / 时序 benchmark

ipv-bench.en:
IPV-Bench (Impossible Videos) tests generation and understanding of **physically impossible** scenarios.

- 4 domains, 14 categories of counterfactual / impossible prompts
- Probes world-knowledge boundaries and safety limits
ipv-bench.zh:
IPV-Bench（Impossible Videos）测试模型对**反现实 / 不可能视频**的生成与理解。

- 4 个 domain、14 个 category 的反事实 prompt
- 用于分析世界模型假设、反事实生成与安全边界

iworld-bench.en:
iWorld-Bench evaluates **interactive world models**: visual generation, trajectory following, and memory under a unified action interface.

- ~330K clips curated to 2.1K samples; 6 task types, ~4.9K tests
- Limit: standardized actions; not open-ended real-robot deployment
iworld-bench.zh:
iWorld-Bench 评测**交互式世界模型**：统一动作接口下的视觉生成、轨迹跟随与记忆。

- 约 330K clips 筛选至 2.1K；6 类任务，约 4.9K 测试样本
- 局限：标准化动作协议；难覆盖开放式真实机器人部署

mirabench.en:
MiraBench (from MiraData) evaluates **long video** generation with 17 metrics across temporal consistency, motion, 3D consistency, quality, and alignment.

- 150 evaluation prompts
- Limit: modest prompt count; offline generation only
mirabench.zh:
MiraBench（MiraData）用 17 个指标评测**长视频**生成：时序一致、运动、3D 一致、质量与对齐等。

- 150 个 evaluation prompts
- 局限：prompt 数量有限；离线生成评测

phyfps-bench-gen.en:
**Unresolved catalog entry** (`phyfps-bench-gen`). Likely a physics-oriented generation module; confirm name, paper, metrics, and scope from README / citation before citing.

- Do not confuse with PhyGenBench or Physics-IQ
phyfps-bench-gen.zh:
**待核实条目**（`phyfps-bench-gen`）。疑似 physics-oriented 生成评测模块；引用前请通过 README / citation 确认名称、论文、指标与范围。

- 避免与 PhyGenBench、Physics-IQ 混淆

phygenbench.en:
PhyGenBench tests T2V **physical commonsense** with 160 prompts across 27 rules and 4 physics domains; PhyGenEval automates rule checks.

- Links video generation to “world simulator” behavior
- Limit: small prompt set; evaluator bias from VLM/LLM judges
phygenbench.zh:
PhyGenBench 用 160 个 prompt（27 条规律、4 个物理领域）测试 T2V **物理常识**；PhyGenEval 自动化规则检查。

- 将视频生成与「世界模拟器」能力关联
- 局限：prompt 规模小；VLM/LLM evaluator 可能有偏差

phyground.en:
PhyGround is a criteria-grounded physics benchmark: 250 prompts, 13 physics laws, sub-questions per law, large human study + PhyJudge-9B.

- Fine-grained, auditable per-law diagnostics
- Limit: expensive; does not cover all real-world dynamics
phyground.zh:
PhyGround 是基于 criteria 的物理 benchmark：250 prompts、13 条物理规律、逐 law 子问题，大规模人工标注 + PhyJudge-9B。

- 细粒度、可审计的 per-law 诊断
- 局限：成本高；无法覆盖全部真实动力学

physics-iq.en:
Physics-IQ checks whether generative video models follow **physics principles** (mechanics, fluids, optics, thermodynamics, magnetism).

- 396 × 8s real-world videos, 66 scenes
- Visual realism ≠ physical understanding
physics-iq.zh:
Physics-IQ 检验生成视频模型是否遵循**物理原则**（力学、流体、光学、热学、磁学等）。

- 396 段 8 秒真实视频，66 个场景
- 视觉真实感 ≠ 物理理解

physvidbench.en:
PhysVidBench validates T2V **physical commonsense** in everyday tool-use and procedural interaction (383 prompts).

- 3-stage pipeline: grounded questions → VLM caption → LLM QA
- Limit: captions may drop fine-grained motion detail
physvidbench.zh:
PhysVidBench 在工具使用与程序化交互等日常场景中验证 T2V **物理常识**（383 prompts）。

- 三阶段：grounded questions → VLM caption → LLM QA
- 局限：caption 可能丢失细粒度动态信息

t2v-compbench.en:
T2V-CompBench is the first systematic **compositional T2V** benchmark: attribute binding, spatial relations, motion binding, numeracy, etc.

- 1,400 prompts across 7 compositional categories
- Limit: depends on external detectors / trackers
t2v-compbench.zh:
T2V-CompBench 是第一个系统化 **compositional T2V** benchmark：属性绑定、空间关系、motion binding、数量控制等。

- 7 类 compositional categories，共 1,400 prompts
- 局限：依赖外部 detector / tracker 能力上限

t2v-safety-bench.en:
T2VSafetyBench evaluates **safety** of T2V models across 12 aspects with malicious, LLM-generated, and jailbreak prompts.

- Video adds temporal risk beyond static images
- Limit: safety norms evolve; dataset needs updates
t2v-safety-bench.zh:
T2VSafetyBench 在 12 个 safety-critical 维度上评测 T2V 模型，含恶意、LLM 生成与 jailbreak prompts。

- 视频相较图像有更强的时序风险
- 局限：安全规范随文化 / 政策变化，需持续更新

t2vworldbench.en:
T2VWorldBench tests **world knowledge** in generated video: physics, nature, culture, causality, objects (1,200 prompts).

- Human + VLM evaluation
- Limit: broad world knowledge; prompts are a representative slice
t2vworldbench.zh:
T2VWorldBench 测试生成视频中的**世界知识**：physics、nature、culture、causality、object 等（1,200 prompts）。

- 人工 + VLM 评测
- 局限：世界知识范围极广，prompt 仅为代表性切片

vbench.en:
VBench decomposes video generation quality into **16 dimensions** (consistency, motion, aesthetics, spatial relations, etc.) with per-dimension prompts and metrics.

- Standard diagnostic suite for T2V papers
- Limit: early focus on fidelity / stability; less on physics and interaction
vbench.zh:
VBench 将视频生成质量拆成 **16 个维度**（一致性、运动、美学、空间关系等），各维度有独立 prompt 与指标。

- T2V 论文常用诊断套件
- 局限：早期偏 fidelity / stability；物理与交互覆盖有限

vbench-2.0.en:
VBench-2.0 targets **intrinsic faithfulness**: human fidelity, controllability, creativity, physics, and commonsense.

- Distinguishes superficial vs intrinsic faithfulness
- Limit: heavy reliance on strong evaluators; judge bias and cost
vbench-2.0.zh:
VBench-2.0 面向 **intrinsic faithfulness**：human fidelity、controllability、creativity、physics、commonsense。

- 区分 superficial vs intrinsic faithfulness
- 局限：强依赖 evaluator；judge bias 与成本较高

vbench-plus-plus.en:
VBench++ extends VBench to **T2V + I2V**, adaptive aspect ratios, Image Suite, and trustworthiness.

- Unified leaderboard tooling across input modalities
- Limit: aggregated scores can hide critical sub-failures
vbench-plus-plus.zh:
VBench++ 将 VBench 扩展到 **T2V + I2V**、自适应宽高比、Image Suite 与 trustworthiness。

- 跨输入模态的统一 leaderboard 工具
- 局限：综合分数可能掩盖关键子能力失败

video-bench.en:
Video-Bench aligns automatic evaluation with **human preference** using MLLM judges across multiple video dimensions.

- Human alignment study validates the pipeline
- Limit: MLLM judge bias; not a full human replacement
video-bench.zh:
Video-Bench 用 MLLM judge 在多维度上对齐**人类偏好**的自动评测。

- 经 human alignment study 验证
- 局限：MLLM judge 有偏差；不能完全替代人工

videophy.en:
VideoPhy tests T2V **physical commonsense** in material interactions (solid-solid, solid-fluid, fluid-fluid, etc.).

- VideoCon-Physics for automated scoring
- Limit: commonsense interactions; not formal physics
videophy.zh:
VideoPhy 测试 T2V **物理常识**，覆盖 solid-solid、solid-fluid、fluid-fluid 等材料交互。

- VideoCon-Physics 支持自动评分
- 局限：以常识交互为主；非形式化物理

videophy2.en:
VideoPhy-2 is an **action-centric** extension: 200 diverse actions, semantic + physical + rule grounding.

- VideoPhy-AutoEval for fast scoring
- Strong models still fail the hard subset
videophy2.zh:
VideoPhy-2 是 **action-centric** 扩展：200 个 diverse actions，语义 + 物理 + 规则 grounding。

- VideoPhy-AutoEval 支持快速评分
- 强模型在 hard subset 上仍难同时满足语义与物理

videoscience-bench.en:
VideoScience-Bench pushes beyond commonsense to **undergraduate-level science** (physics + chemistry, 200 prompts, 103 concepts).

- T2V and I2V; five expert / VLM judge dimensions
- Limit: complex phenomena hard for automatic judges
videoscience-bench.zh:
VideoScience-Bench 从 commonsense 推进到**本科级科学理解**（physics + chemistry，200 prompts，103 concepts）。

- 覆盖 T2V / I2V；五个专家 / VLM judge 维度
- 局限：复杂现象对自动 judge 仍困难

videoscore.en:
VideoScore is a **human-feedback-trained metric** (VideoFeedback: 37.6K videos, 11 models) for fine-grained automatic scoring.

- Useful for ranking, best-of-K, and reward modeling
- Limit: distribution drift; needs periodic refresh
videoscore.zh:
VideoScore 是基于**人类反馈训练**的自动指标（VideoFeedback：37.6K 视频，11 个模型）。

- 可用于排名、best-of-K、reward modeling
- 局限：受训练分布影响；需定期更新

videoverse.en:
VideoVerse asks how far T2V generators are from **world models**, focusing on event-level temporal causality and world knowledge.

- 300 prompts, 815 events, 793 binary QA; 10 dimensions
- QA-based VLM pipeline for dynamic + static checks
videoverse.zh:
VideoVerse 从世界模型视角问：T2V generator 离真正的 world model 还有多远，聚焦 event-level 时序因果与世界知识。

- 300 prompts，815 events，793 binary QA；10 个维度
- QA-based VLM pipeline 做 dynamic + static 检查

vmbench.en:
VMBench (Video Motion Benchmark) aligns motion metrics with **human motion perception** via perception-driven prompts and scores.

- Meta-guided motion prompt library
- Limit: motion authenticity; not world knowledge or long interaction
vmbench.zh:
VMBench（Video Motion Benchmark）用 perception-driven prompts 与指标对齐**人类运动感知**。

- Meta-guided motion prompt library
- 局限：偏 motion authenticity；非世界知识或长时交互

wbench.en:
WBench is a **multi-turn interactive** world-model benchmark: 289 cases, 1,058 turns, unified text / 6-DoF / discrete control.

- 22 automatic sub-metrics validated against humans
- Limit: standardized interactions; not open-ended intent
wbench.zh:
WBench 是**多轮交互式**世界模型 benchmark：289 cases，1,058 turns，统一 text / 6-DoF / discrete control。

- 22 个 automatic sub-metrics 经人工验证
- 局限：标准化交互；难覆盖开放式意图

world-in-world.en:
World-in-World is a **closed-loop** generative world-model platform: task success in embodied environments, not open-loop video quality.

- High visual quality ≠ high task success
- Controllability and action-observation scaling matter more
world-in-world.zh:
World-in-World 是**闭环** generative world-model 平台：以具身环境任务成功率为核心，而非 open-loop 视频质量。

- 高视觉质量 ≠ 高任务成功率
- controllability 与 action-observation scaling 更关键

worldarena.en:
WorldArena unifies **perceptual quality** and **functional utility** for embodied world models (EWMScore, 16 perception metrics + task functionality).

- Perception–functionality gap: pretty video ≠ better decisions
- WorldArena 2.0 extends modality and platform coverage
worldarena.zh:
WorldArena 统一 embodied world model 的**感知质量**与**功能效用**（EWMScore，16 个感知指标 + 任务功能）。

- perception–functionality gap：画面好 ≠ 决策更好
- WorldArena 2.0 扩展模态与平台

worldbench.en:
WorldBench is a **disentangled physics** diagnostic: continuation from short input video, one physical concept per case.

- Intuitive understanding + material constants (friction, viscosity, …)
- Limit: controlled probes vs open-world distribution
worldbench.zh:
WorldBench 是**解耦物理**诊断 benchmark：从短视频输入生成 continuation，每个样例隔离单一物理概念。

- intuitive understanding + 材料常数（摩擦、粘度等）
- 局限：控制式 probe vs 开放场景分布

worldmodelbench.en:
WorldModelBench judges video generators as **world models** via instruction-following and physics-adherence (7 domains, 56 subdomains, 67K labels).

- Catches subtle violations (size drift, mass conservation) missed by generic metrics
- Limit: judge reliability and domain coverage still expanding
worldmodelbench.zh:
WorldModelBench 通过 instruction-following 与 physics-adherence 判断视频生成器是否为**世界模型**（7 domains，56 subdomains，67K labels）。

- 捕捉 generic metrics 难发现的 subtle violations
- 局限：judge 可靠性与 domain 覆盖仍在扩展

worldscore.en:
WorldScore unifies **3D / 4D / I2V / T2V world generation** as next-scene tasks under camera or layout control (3,000 examples).

- Controllability, quality, dynamics
- Limit: interactive / closed-loop eval needs WBench, WorldArena, etc.
worldscore.zh:
WorldScore 将 **3D / 4D / I2V / T2V world generation** 统一为 camera / layout 约束下的 next-scene 任务（3,000 examples）。

- controllability、quality、dynamics
- 局限：交互 / 闭环评测需结合 WBench、WorldArena 等

libero.en: LIBERO is a lifelong robot manipulation benchmark with language-conditioned tasks across spatial, object, goal, and long-horizon suites.
libero.zh: LIBERO 是语言条件机器人操作的 lifelong benchmark，覆盖 spatial、object、goal 与 long-horizon 任务套件。

libero-para.en: LIBERO-Paraphrase tests whether VLA policies generalize when task language is paraphrased.
libero-para.zh: LIBERO-Paraphrase 测试 VLA 策略在任务语言 paraphrase 下的泛化能力。

simpler-env.en: SimplerEnv provides simulation-based embodied evaluation for real-to-sim policy testing and task-success mapping.
simpler-env.zh: SimplerEnv 提供基于仿真的 embodied evaluation，用于 real-to-sim 策略测试与 task-success mapping。

robotwin.en: RoboTwin 2.0 is a bimanual manipulation benchmark with diverse tasks and sim-to-real oriented evaluation.
robotwin.zh: RoboTwin 2.0 是双臂操作 benchmark，含多样任务与 sim-to-real 导向评测。
